ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-13-2010 IN 220, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE (CCP 583.310) HEARD. THE COURT SEVERED THE CASE FROM COON GROUP 6 AND SET THE CASE SOLO FOR TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE WAS ADVANCED FROM 1/3/2011 TO 11/1/10 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE LAST DAY TO HEAR MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENTS IS 10/21/10. A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS SET FOR 10/22/10 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 603. NO LATER THAN 10/18/10, PLAINTIFF SHALL MAKE A SETTLEMENT DEMAND ON ALL REMAINING DEFENDANTS. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL DEPT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE DUE NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. EXPERT DISCLOSURES ARE DUE 49 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL. FURTHER TERMS WERE STATED ON THE RECORD. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE AN ORDER AND MS. NUSSER IS APPOINTED TO APPROVE IT AS TO FORM. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: E.
